steps.title: Identify the stated goal
steps.content: The student's purpose is clear and singular: indicate where the story takes place. This determines which note is relevant to use in the answer.

steps.title: Select the note that matches the goal
steps.content: A directly answers by stating where the story takes place (Harlem). B, C, and D are all accurate information from the notes but focus on the author, publication, and narrative perspective—none of which locate the story. That confirms A is correct.
